spec_compliance.do_not_derive_from_dukascopy: PASS (refused to use existing derived data)

rejection_reason: MT5 terminal cannot run on Linux. No real MT5 data can be acquired in this environment. Exness broker has no public API. The 1,299 existing exness_mt5/*.parquet files are DERIVED from Dukascopy (violates spec requirement 'Do not derive data from Dukascopy'). Real MT5 data acquisition requires: Windows OS + MT5 terminal installed + Exness account login + Python MetaTrader5 package. None of these are available in current environment.
remediation_options: OPTION A: Run this audit on a Windows machine with MT5 terminal installed and Exness account logged in
OPTION B: Provide Windows VPS with MT5 + Exness credentials, then re-run this audit
OPTION C: Provide an alternative Linux-accessible source for REAL Exness MT5 data (none currently known)
OPTION D: Accept that real MT5 data acquisition is not possible in this environment and proceed with Dukascopy-only baseline
